titleStmt.title: SII 26.348: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 348. (A.R. No. 329 of 1909.) KŪVAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the same shrine.

p.hi: Tribhº Kulōttuṅga-chōḷadēva III: Year 8, Aippaśi = 1185-86 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Puyalvāyppa vaḷamperuga, etc.

It records a gift of a nandā lamp to the temple of the god Tiruviṟkōlamuḍaiyār of Kūvam alias Tiyāgasamuttiranallūr in Maṇaviṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍasōḻa-maṇḍalam by a certain Kuṟumuḍi Śaṅgaṉ Gōvindan alias Vāṉavaṉ Mūvēndavēḷāṉ. It is stated that he endowed for this purpose, 16 Aṉṟāḍu naṟpaḻaṅkāśu which was received by the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple viz., Śennaṟpeṟṟāṉ Mahādēva-bhaṭṭan of Kaviśika (Kauśika)-[gōtra], Uḍaiyapiḷḷai alias Tavarāśarāśa-bhaṭṭaṉ of Gavutama-[gōtra], his younger brothers, Tiruvallamuḍaiyāṉ-bhaṭṭaṉ of Gavutama-[gōtra], Dēvar alias Poṟkōyilnambi of Kāśyapa-[gōtra], and his younger brothers, who had agreed to carry out the object of the endowment perpetually.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . puyal vāyppa vaḷam perukap poyyāta nānmaṟaiyin cayāl(v)Read ceyal • vāypat tirumakaḷuñ ceyamakaḷuñ ciṟantu vāḻa veṇmatipol kuṭaiviḷaṅka vel ventaraṭi paṇiya maṇmaṭantai manaṅkaḷippa maṉuniti taḻaittoṅkac ca
kkaramuñ ceṅkoluñ tikkaṉaittuñ celanaṭappak kaṟpakālam puvipākkap poṟpamainta muṭi pūṉaintu cempoṉ virasiṁhāsanattuppuvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāna tiripuvaṉaccakkarava
ttikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 8 Āvatu Appaci mātattu ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu maṇaviṟkoṭṭattu kūvamāṉa tiyākacamuttiranallūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruviṟkolamuṭaiyārkku kuṟumuṭi caṅkaṉ kovintanā
na vāṉavaṉ muventaveḷāṉ vaikkiṟa tirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟukku Ikkoyil civappirāmaṇaril kavucikaṉ cenneṟpeṟṟāṉ mahādevapaṭṭanum gavutamaṉ Uṭaiyapiḷḷaiyāṉa tavarācarācapaṭṭaṉum tampimārum gavutaman tiruvallamuṭaiyāṉ
paṭṭaṉum kāsyapaṉ tevarāṉa poṟkoyil nampiyum tampimārum Ivvaṉaivom Ikkuṟumuṭi caṅkaṉ kovintaṉāṉa vāṉavaṉ muventaveḷān pakkal Eṭṭāvatu Aippaci māsamutal poliyūṭṭāka nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭa
Aṉṟāṭu naṟpaḻaṅkācu patināṟu Ikkācu patināṟum Eṅkaḷ kāṇipotiyile kaikkoṇṭu Ittirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟum cantirātittavaṟ celuttakkaṭavomāka nām Ivvaṉaivom Ippaṭikkumivai kavucikan cenneṟpeṟṟān
mahādevapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai gavutaman Uṭaiyapiḷḷaiyāna tavarācarācapaṭṭan Eḻuttu § Ippaṭikku yivai gavutaman tiruvallamuṭaiyān paṭṭan Eḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivai kāsyapan tevarāna poṟkoyilnampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭi
Aṟiven pāracivan ponnaṉāna tiyākacamuttira Ācāri śrīmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 26.348 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
